title: Loopback Feedback Schema
description: Validates the feedback payload injected back into the worker's context during refinement (Step 5 of the 7-Step Loop). Delivered after a review rejection to guide the worker's rework iteration.

status.description: Current state of this loopback cycle. 'LOOPBACK_PENDING' = worker should refine. 'LOOPBACK_RESOLVED' = all issues addressed. 'LOOPBACK_ESCALATED' = human intervention needed.

iteration.description: Which refinement iteration this is. Incremented each loop. After MAX_ITERATIONS the contract escalates to human.

feedbackSource.description: Name of the system or agent that generated this feedback (e.g. 'Jules', 'AGY Review', 'Human Reviewer').

message.description: Primary message to the worker — what failed and what needs to change. Direct, actionable, and specific.

errorLog.description: Raw error log, compiler output, or stack trace relevant to the failure.

resolvedItems.description: List of specific issues from the previous review that have been resolved. Included only when status='LOOPBACK_RESOLVED'.

remainingItems.description: List of issues still unresolved. Shortens each iteration until empty.

context.description: Additional context or hints to help the worker understand the feedback. May include references to documentation, examples, or related code.
